command:
CLUSTER_ID=00d42c2a-1bf1-4ef3-8112-325210229bb0
cd /opt/kafka
if [ ! -f /var/lib/kafka/data/.formatted ]; then
  /opt/kafka/bin/kafka-storage.sh format -t 00d42c2a-1bf1-4ef3-8112-325210229bb0 -c /config/server.properties --ignore-formatted
  touch /var/lib/kafka/data/.formatted
fi
/opt/kafka/bin/kafka-server-start.sh /config/server.properties
containers.name: kafka
